children.text: Turning on "Location Alerts" lets us notify you of paid, location-based surveys, even when the app is closed.
Two thumbs up means you're eligible to receive valuable location-based surveys.

There are no available surveys at this time. Making sure notifications are "on" will ensure you're immediately alerted about new surveys. If you have a survey code, you may enter it now. Survey codes are distributed by SOTG partners for special survey opportunities, and not all users will have a survey code.
